title: 2021-2025 Toyota Sienna Hybrid 2nd Row Seat Removal And Airbag Warning Light Disabling Instructions
description: Remove and reinstall 2021-2026 Toyota Sienna second row seats, including airbag connector handling and SRS system management to prevent warning lights.
tips: Remove the headrest first to make the seat more compact and easier to maneuver out of the vehicle.
Disconnect the negative battery terminal before disconnecting any airbag connectors as a safety precaution.
Install 2.2 ohm resistors into the airbag connectors when the seat is removed to prevent an airbag warning light from appearing.
Tape resistors in place and route the harness under the front seat so they don't get kicked out during driving.
When reinstalling, only hand-thread the front bolts first before moving to the rear bolts — fully tightening the front first can prevent the rear bolts from seating properly.
Move seat carriages to parallel/level positions before reinstalling the seat so the track lines up correctly.
Reconnect the battery and initialize doors and hatch after reconnecting — refer to the 12V battery removal video for the initialization procedure.
Check that the wire harness clip teeth are not damaged during removal so they hold the harness properly on reinstall.
